landing.pageTitle: Whist - The Modern Classic Card Game | Score Tracker
landing.metaDescription: Track your Whist card game scores online. Free digital scorekeeper for 4-player trick-taking card games. Real-time scoring, leaderboards, and game history.

hero.description: A sanctuary for the discerning card player. Experience the height of tactical play within an environment of absolute digital refinement.

table.title: The Table
table.subtitle: Where Strategy Meets Serenity
table.dealerDesc: The Trump suit has been declared. Strategy begins before the first lead.
table.fourPlayersDesc: Two fixed partnerships. Absolute silence. Every card played is a signal to your ally.
table.trickTakingDesc: The goal is simple: win the majority of the 13 tricks. The execution is an art form.

ledger.title: The Ledger:
ledger.subtitle: A Record of Eminence
ledger.description: Every hand played is inscribed in the permanent Ledger. Track your climb through the ranks from Initiate to Sovereign.

rules.dealText: A full deck of 52 cards is dealt clockwise, one at a time, until each of the four players holds exactly thirteen. The final card belongs to the dealer and reveals the Trump suit for that hand.
rules.playText: The player to the dealer's left leads the first trick. You must follow suit if possible. If you cannot follow suit, you may play any card, including a Trump. The highest card of the suit led—or the highest Trump—takes the trick.
rules.scoreText: Once all thirteen tricks have been played, the partnership with the majority (more than six tricks) scores one point for every trick over six. The first partnership to five points wins the game.

cta.title: Ready to take your seat?
cta.description: The doors are open. High stakes, higher intellect, and an atmosphere of unparalleled sophistication await you.
